data.content: Implemented global repo-cycle hotkeys: Shift+R now cycles forward with wraparound and Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+R cycles backward with wraparound across all Beats screens via AppHeader global listener. Added shared helpers getRepoCycleDirection/cycleRepoPath with tests plus a layout guard test to keep behavior global. Quality gates: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (1962 pass), bun run build passes with NODE_ENV=production (session default NODE_ENV caused prior non-standard-env build failure). Commit: 9f4d5e61bcf2.
